mapper.sql: cl.cef_id, cl.claim_no, cl.pure_fuel_purch_dt, cl.fuel_prdc_co_nm, cl.fuel_prdc_addr, cl.fuel_prdc_dt, cl.fuel_prdc_lc, cl.fuel_type_cd, cl.fdstk_type_cd, cl.conv_proc_cd, cl.batch_id_no, cl.pure_fuel_mass, cl.batch_purch_ratio, cl.batch_purch_mass, cl.use_bgng_dt, cl.use_end_dt, cl.frst_reg_dt, cl.frst_reg_user_id, cl.last_chg_dt, cl.last_chg_user_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM er.tn_cef_claim cl WHERE cl.cef_id = #{cefId} AND NOW() BETWEEN cl.use_bgng_dt AND cl.use_end_dt ORDER BY cl.claim_no ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO er.tn_cef_claim (cef_id, claim_no, pure_fuel_purch_dt, fuel_prdc_co_nm, fuel_prdc_addr, fuel_prdc_dt, fuel_prdc_lc, fuel_type_cd, fdstk_type_cd, conv_proc_cd, batch_id_no, pure_fuel_mass, batch_purch_ratio, batch_purch_mass, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{cefId}, #{claimNo}, #{pureFuelPurchDt}, #{fuelPrdcCoNm}, #{fuelPrdcAddr}, #{fuelPrdcDt}, #{fuelPrdcLc}, #{fuelTypeCd}, #{fdstkTypeCd}, #{convProcCd}, #{batchIdNo}, #{pureFuelMass}, #{batchPurchRatio}, #{batchPurchMass}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE er.tn_cef_claim SET pure_fuel_purch_dt = #{pureFuelPurchDt}, fuel_prdc_co_nm = #{fuelPrdcCoNm}, fuel_prdc_addr = #{fuelPrdcAddr}, fuel_prdc_dt = #{fuelPrdcDt}, fuel_prdc_lc = #{fuelPrdcLc}, fuel_type_cd = #{fuelTypeCd}, fdstk_type_cd = #{fdstkTypeCd}, conv_proc_cd = #{convProcCd}, batch_id_no = #{batchIdNo}, pure_fuel_mass = #{pureFuelMass}, batch_purch_ratio = #{batchPurchRatio}, batch_purch_mass = #{batchPurchMass}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE cef_id = #{cefId} AND claim_no = #{claimNo} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
mapper.select: SELECT 'SAF' AS source_type, sb.batch_id AS source_id, CAST(NULL AS varchar) AS claim_no, sb.oprtr_id AS oprtr_id, o.oprtr_nm AS oprtr_nm, CAST(NULL AS char) AS rprt_yr, sb.batch_qty AS mass FROM saf.tn_saf_batch sb JOIN com.tn_oprtr o ON o.oprtr_id = sb.oprtr_id AND NOW() BETWEEN o.use_bgng_dt AND o.use_end_dt WHERE sb.batch_id = #{batchIdNo} AND NOW() BETWEEN sb.use_bgng_dt AND sb.use_end_dt ORDER BY sb.oprtr_id
